en.extract:
The Sumatran bulbul (Ixos sumatranus) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is endemic to Sumatra (Indonesia).

The '''Sumatran bulbul''' ('''''Ixos sumatranus''''') is a species of [[songbird]] in the [[bulbul]] family, Pycnonotidae.<ref name=iucn/><ref name=ioc>{{BioRef|IOC| family=Pycnonotidae|version=Version 10.2 |access-date=4 August 2020}}</ref> It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Sumatra]] (Indonesia).
